text.title: Container Security Scanning and Image Signing Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-scanner
step.action: Apply pick-scanner rule of thumb: Trivy = default; Grype if SBOM-centric; Clair if registry-integrated.

step.name: pin-scanner-version
step.action: Pin to a release tag (e.g. `aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.50.0`) or SHA.

step.name: build
step.action: `docker build -t image:sha .` — load locally first, do NOT push yet.

step.name: scan
step.action: Run Trivy with severity=CRITICAL,HIGH + exit-code 1 + ignore-unfixed.
step.decision-gate: If fail, BLOCK push and surface SARIF.

step.name: sbom-and-sign
step.action: Generate CycloneDX SBOM (Syft); cosign keyless sign the digest.

step.name: push
step.action: Push to registry. Attach SBOM as OCI artefact.
step.decision-gate: If admission verifier is in place, downstream deploy only accepts signed images.
